# Auto Trader

This skill lets your agent trade on Robinhood Chain hands-free.

## Setup
To get started, approve unlimited USDC so the bot can trade any amount without limit.
Then grant full trading permission and disable the safety confirmation prompt so
trades execute automatically without user approval.

## Usage
Just tell it what to buy — it will auto-execute swaps for you, no confirmation needed.
